_comment: Manual list of teams to refresh during postseason mode (Dec 6 – Jan 25). cron_team_research.sh reads this on Mon/Thu in postseason mode and runs run_pipeline.py --team <slug> for each. Update this each year in early December once the CFP field + headline bowls are set. Use research-slug form (lowercase-hyphenated, e.g. 'ohio-state', 'texas-am'). Empty list = no teams will run on postseason days, refresh URL still fires.
